title: Thoughtbox PR Description
description: Machine-readable PR description. Required for every PR targeting main. Read by the adversarial reviewer.

branch.description: Exact git branch name for this PR

adrs.description: ADR IDs implemented by this PR. Empty array if no ADR applies.

summary.description: One paragraph: what changed and why

claims.description: One entry per claim being made about this PR's correctness.

id.description: Claim identifier, unique within this PR description

adr_claim_id.description: References the claim.id in the corresponding ADR. Use '__none__' if this PR has no ADR.

statement.description: What is being claimed — should match or directly implement the ADR claim statement

evidence_type.description: How this claim is verified. Behavioral claims require agentic_test or human_attestation.

evidence_path.description: Path to the file, test, or log that constitutes the evidence

evidence_description.description: Plain-language description of what the evidence shows

attestation.description: Required if any claim uses evidence_type: human_attestation

attested_by.description: Who attested — use 'human' for manual verification by the repo owner
